end end BringEnemy=function()if not _B then return end for v0,v1 in pairs(workspace[v149("u4\025\232*\004C","a0Z|\133C")]:GetChildren())do if v28=getrawmetatable(game)local v29=v28[v149("\t\207\142\031\205B\255j:\252","\vV\144\224~\160\'\156")]setreadonly(v28,false)v28[v149("{\203YD\163\127\004E\248[","g$\1487%\206\026")]=newcclosure(function(...)local v0=getnamecallmethod()local v1={...}if tostring(v0)==v149("\199XK\158\217\151\238\243\220\163","=\12919\251\138\242\156\133\185\209c\145[\156U")then if tostring(v1[1])==v149("\005:6NE9\v!:5U","NW_[!1\\")then if tostring(v1[2])~=v149("?J\175N","FK8\218+\248yK\165\020hd\153")and tostring(v1[2])~=v149("\201\156\245_y","`\175\253\153,\028")then if v29(unpack(v1))end end end end return v29(...)end)GetConnectionEnemies=function(v0)for v1,v2 in pairs(replicated:GetChildren())do if end end collectFruits=function(v0)if v0 then local v0=plr[v149(":I\204\243s\163\127\vk","By!\173\129\018\192\vn\025")]for v1,v2 in pairs(workspace:GetChildren())do if plr[v149("\251F\164\137BZ\1824\136","\015\184.\197\251#9\194Q\250\133\208(\186i\127")]:FindFirstChild(v0)end GetIn=function(v0)for v1,v2 in pairs(replicated[v149("\143E\026N\189\205@","A\221 type(v2)==v149("\166S\1380\206","\\\2102\232\\\171j\210\140\184\a")then if v2[v149("\189\250,?","C\243\155AZ\171\247\029")]==v0 or plr[v149("\149\149\131\196\200\180\139\027\162","\210\214\253\226\182\169\215\255~\208G\245")]:FindFirstChild(v0)or plr[v149("o\1336\019\025\183\128\199","\022-\228Uxi\214\227\172\028D>")]:FindFirstChild(v0)then return true end end end return false end GetM=function(v0)for v1,v2 in pairs(replicated[v149("\204\192\003\004\003f:","\249\158\165nkw\003I\237@2")][v149("\177\t\015\169\198\184","\235\242fb\196\128\231<\024\241g")]:InvokeServer(v149("\226A<\028R(\136Yh\202\247]","\165\133$HU<^\2377\028")))do if type(v2)==v149("\146\222\181\003\207","_\230\191\215o\170")then if v2[v149("\187}\214\169","\250\239\004\166\204\224\180G\177\145\198\167\200\177\147\251")]==v149("\2529\016WS\223?6","g\177Xd2!\182^Z\203=\023\207X\199")then if v2[v149("\137\141R\207","]\199\236?\170\240\213\202\181\169")]==v0 then return v2[v149("\233\019C|\159","v\170|6\018\235\194\154ThFR\003\208]\170")]end end end end return 0 end GetWP=function(v0)for v1,v2 in pairs(replicated[v149("4qP\149\231k\026","if\020=\250\147\014")][v149("\129C\138\"C\165","\165\194,\231O\005\250\138\012:")]:InvokeServer(v149("3\161\250\167%\154\"A\173;\182\247","\217T\196\142\238K\236G/")))do if type(v2)==v149("4\213R;\190","\244@\1800W\219pS\211\245\240\217\174")then if v2[v149("a)\228\174","\1895P\148\203\229g\"\v")]==v149("{\155\180+\179","\155(\236\219Y\215\172")then if v2[v149("\012\181\207z","\019B\212\162\031\rV/\209\004\139\220")]==v0 or plr[v149("\166\147\1968\201\030\156\148Q","\248\229\251\165J\168}\232\241#\r&")]:FindFirstChild(v0)or plr[v149("\141\216 cP%\162\018","y\207\185C\b D\193")]:FindFirstChild(v0)then return true end end end end return false end getInfinity_Ability=function(v0,v1)if not Root then return end if v0==v149("\a\209\199]","!T\190\181(S\016\215V")and v1 then for v0,v2 in next,getgc()do if plr[v149("\029t\221\031\191\025\246T\000","\249^\028\188m\222z\1301r\138\151\230\020\177")][v149("\030\249\146v","\246M\150\224\003CQG\024EK\232")]then if typeof(v2)==v149("}~v\219\002\231\241s","}\027\v\024\184v\142\158\029\012U")and(getfenv(v2))[v149("\202\b\150C\194\222","=\185k\228*\178\170\015")]==plr[v149("\245\139C\171\163G\171tW","%\182\227\"\217\194$\223\017")][v149("\217\014\198\196","\253\138a\180\177=ov\153B\242\216")]then for v0,v2 in next,getupvalues(v2)do if typeof(v2)==v149("G\214\002\238l","\1743\183`\130\t\141\015b\195")then repeat wait(Sec)v2[v149("5//\180!\031\n","\ryN\\\192tlo\187")]=0 until not v1 or plr[v149("\207?\199 \142\193>\233%","J\140W\166R\239\162")][v149("\026A[hD\15146","]R46\t*\248")][v149("^?@(\129\140","\149\022Z!D\245\228")]<=0 end end end end end elseif v0==v149("\142=\0216\179\027","^\203SpD\212b\253\212i\251\186")and v1 then plr[v149("i\025\187!9\130:VJ","\137*q\218SX\225N38")][v149(".\175\153\000i\239","\142k\193\252r\014\150r~_C\156")][v149("\128!\017\130\247\203k","\216\195Ip\236\144\174\015|\158a\251\227\148b\193")]:connect(function()if v1 then plr[v149("_\240\131T+\2111\020?","\184\028\152\226&J\176EqM|(\017\r")][v149("K\166\218\244M\132","\212\014\200\191\134*\253+`?\253\012\185")][v149("z*\234\195\184","\164,K\134\182\221b\024\130\211")]=Energy v0=plr[v149("\231l72S\238\240\b\207\021\153\194","\236\177\005D[<\128\162i\171|")]v0[v149("u\004\214\146\184","\b#e\186\231\221\196\028\137\192\231\200\238\136=")]=math[v149("\196\168\131\002","\016\172\221\228gEG\210\182\138v\192\136\248\178\175")]end v1=replicated[v149("\189\a\026\195\245\152\135*\v\212\232\153\145=;","\238\226XI\166\135")]:InvokeServer(v0)for v0,v1 in next,v1 do if tonumber(v1[v149("*JLmW","\232i%9\003#\014\166")])<12 then TeleportService:TeleportToPlaceInstance(game[v149("\167\127\016\247\195\198\221","\138\247\019q\148\166\143\185\174")],v0)end end end end)end local v30=Instance[v149("\v-\147","\003eH\228\149\208:\b\148\163\224\190")](v149("Z\163\0026","m\n\194pB+\218\0028Pc\152"),workspace)v30[v149("\185\139kM","\147\234\226\017(kYD\245\178\135\001")]=Vector3[v149("3\203j","/]\174\029\t\016\020t")](1,1,1)v30[v149("\226\164\152<","\134\172\197\245Y,\016\027\160a\001\181\210\168\179")]=v149("\v\129\023\230]K\a\136(","tY\232g\185\020%c\250Ix\1665\186\193I")v30[v149("\159?Q\182R,4\196","\241\222Q2\222=^Q\160")]=true v31=workspace:FindFirstChild(v30[v149("\229\249\195\014","\021\171\152\174k\131\204\015\016\176\165N\171")])if v31 and v31~=v30 then v31:Destroy()end task[v149("\221\129\000\127","\021\170\224i\v\148\210\143.\162`\216\232s\129")]()do pcall(function()if(getgenv())[v149("V\163\202\241\224\023","Q\025\205\140\144\146z\134\204\bN\135\162e")]then if v30 and v30[v149("\128\162b\204\249\002","\201\208\195\016\169\151v3\213")]==workspace then local v1=v0[v149("\250z\024\227\245\v\001a\218","\166\185\018y\145\148hu\004\168\131qv[G")]and v0[v149("\212w\206\021l}\232o}","\023\151\031\175g\r\030\156\n\015\024\v\180")][v149("U\170\174\189\232J\181\179ww\172","\022\005\216\199\208\1378\204\227")]if v1 and(v1[v149("k\166\198w\218Ow*","\151;\201\181\030\174&\024D\226\147\238j\233H\004")]-v30[v149("\249\198C\134\179\003a\005","\151\169\1690\239\199j\014koZ")])[v149("\"\028\253\155\166\n\239\161\147","\162o}\154\245\207~\154\197\246\166O{")]<=200 then v1[v149("1\182g\187\209\216","?r\240\021\218\188\189\197\a}")]=v30[v149("\217#\235D?\226","\191\154e\153%R\135\215\024i\174\209\001^")]else v1=v0[v149("A\024\142\248\1367v\021\157","T\002p\239\138\233")]if v1 then for v0,v1 in pairs(v1:GetChildren())do if local v1=v0[v149("-\240%\1287\175\128\248\154","\232n\152D\242V\204\244\157")]if v1 then for v0,v1 in pairs(v1:GetChildren())do if v1:IsA(v149("\025\193\012\025A\000\026/","h[\160\127|\017a"))then v1[v149("\134\237\182\v\030\216fh\030\160","z\197\140\216Hq\180\n\001")]=true end end end end end)end end)_tp=function(v0)local v1=plr[v149("~X\219Ob\236\163\023~","\199=0\186=\003\143\215r\012\192\134\195")]if not v1 or not v1:FindFirstChild(v149("\014bz\166.\209NMO\222\183\140\005\a\019\162","\214F\023\023\199@\190\')\029\177\216\248Ufa"))then return end local v2=v1[v149("\254\178\250\215\131\182\130\016\228\168\248\194\189\184\153\000","t\182\199\151\182\237\217\235")]local v3=(v0[v149("Zp~\189OWfS","\224\n\031\r\212;>\t=\171\023\229/\234=")]-v2[v149("\229\139\006\238\161\187\210<","R\181\228u\135\213\210\189")])[v149("\"\141Ld\168\235\246Xw","\224o\236+\n\193\159\131<\018\128\222J\"\219\180")]local v4=TweenInfo[v149("\164u\192","9\202\016\183\024\227\202H^\202\234R)!\155B")](v3/300,Enum[v149("F\146{;\236\206\186>\193\241\199","T\003\243\bR\130\169\233J\184\157\162\005:")][v149("\170YU\236\147\151","v\2300;\137\242\229\135\233\137\177\199+:")])local v5=(game:GetService(v149("O\188\131Pr\145d\208\183\247\225~","\130\027\203\2305\028\194\001\162\193\158"))):Create(v30,v4,{[v149("\240\2413\244\192\144","\190\179\183A\149\173\245\200\255\166\234\171\001\135")]=v0})if plr[v149("\176\252\223\n\222xin9","\133\243\148\190x\191\027\029\vK\199\tm")][v149("RO\027\234\169\198\184\218","\149\026:v\139\199\169\209\190\\\250G")][v149("\178P\130","\146\2259\246\016\019\1922\163\233\028\204\211")]==true then v30[v149("\155\240\200\004\239\135","\129\216\182\186e\130\226\228gj5\005-\148\213")]=CFrame[v149("F\241\012","=(\148{\189\190e;\202e@\199-]\201")](v30[v149("m\249\217>\012E\195=","\185=\150\170Wx,\172S\v\196]\ri")][v149("\250","\005\162\253Yo\155\2511$")],v0[v149("\229","\131\188dK\r\130\143\141z\253\152\'\023=\209\189")],v30[v149("\223\171\182\153\n\0287\247","\129\143\196\197\240~uX\153\245O\225\163\0146")][v149("\181","\030\239\172\223\027\216\143")])end v5:Play()task[v149("\128<\135\232\021","W\243L\230\159{\163")](function()while v5[v149("\160\018\"\025\020\235\198\155-7\001\002\239","\165\240~C`v\138")]==Enum[v149("m\243\232O\163z\196\191w\134z>L","G=\159\1376\193\027\167\212$\242\027J)")][v149("\248\179\005}\203\015\v","}\168\223d\004\162alx")]do if not shouldTween then v5:Cancel()break end task[v149("c\014(\220","O\020oA\168\187\209e\247m\230\210\150\018\001")](.1)end end)end TeleportToTarget=function(v0)if(v0[v149("\211\174$\185\177\227\243o",":\131\193W\208\197\138\156\001\031q\207\145\222\246")]-plr[v149(">\b\131\194\014tA\222[","[}`\226\176o\0235\187)\027\178")][v149("\250b\168A then _tp(v0)else _tp(v0)end end notween=function(v0)plr[v149("&\157zl\227{f\003\023","fe\245\027\030\130\024\018")][v149("\154x\240\130P\023\167\020\246\173c\245\135\128L\017","e\210\r\157\227>x\206p\164\194\012\129\215\225>")][v149("\247\164\192\128\247~","\185\180\226\178\225\154\027\21342\243\228\212b")]=v0 end function BTP(v0)local v1=game[v149("F\232\192\245\190Cf","\150\022\132\161\140\2191\021\227\187\135VYw")][v149("?\a;\128f\127\171\018\017=\147","\199shX\225\n/")]local v2=v1[v149("\020\168\254\194\021\180XS-","\250W\192\159\176t\215,6_\023")][v149("T`\142\2256\221Y\226\175Y\015\005Lt\145\244","q\028\021\227\128X\1780\134\2536`")]local v3=v1[v149("\136\146\209\002\136_ht\221","\202\203\250\176p\233<\028\017\175r#")][v149(")\160\200\169\141\220f6","\171a\213\165\200\227\179\015RHeJ\155")]local v4=v1[v149("/\148Q\026\237\170(\226o","!\127\2480c\136\216o\151\006\1906}\v")][v149("E\"\217\234","K\bC\176\132v\015C\031j1@\153\028f\012")]local v5=v0[v149("\249D\244,\014\241\156\199","\243\169+\135Ez\152")]local v6=v2[v149("2\025`\142L?}\235","*bv\019\2318V\018\133\159\002\144\228\252\021U")]repeat v3[v149("\181\158%\200\160S","&\253\251D\164\212;\169\ba\151\\I")]=0 v2[v149("\153\246\193c\215i","\146\218\176\179\002\186\012\029")]=v0 v4[v149("4\216M\128\241","\003e\173(\243\133\198g")][v149("\241\137\003\146\'\131\222","\195\167\224p\251E\239\187\255\181f\022\209\210\172Q")]=false if(v2[v149("\249\165G\216#T\024\r","\014\169\2024\177W=wc,DB")]-v6)[v149("\136\"`)`p\176\'b","\004\197C\aG\t")]>1 then v6=v2[v149("\231\1742;\146\187\216\175","\210\183\193AR\230")]v2[v149("\239s\188Kca","\232\1725\206*\014\004")]=v0 end task[v149("\1417X\206","\193\250V1\186\217\131F")](.5)until(v0[v149("H\025\210\197\216\027\216\248","_\024v\161\172\172r\183\150\159\142\157\012\025")]-v2[v149("\153\241\160\251\164\133s|","R\201\158\211\146\208\236\028\018\"b")])[v149("QC\148Pt\176iF\150","\196\028\"\243>\029")]<=2000 end end QuestBeta=function()local v0=QuestB()return{[0]=_G[v149("T\v9p\142\197\237\224","\147\018bW\020\204\170\158")],[1]=bMon;[2]=Qdata;[3]=Qname;[4]=PosB,[5]=PosQBoss}end QuestCheck=function()local end end MaterialMon=function()local v0=game[v149("r\177n\139\148\138\152","\235\"\221\015\242\241\248")][v149("\149\136;\1458\179\250E\136X\163","\209\217\231X\240T\227\150$\241=")]local v1=v0[v149("|K\229dr\216\r\004v","x?#\132\022\019\187ya\004)\006")]and v0[v149("\128\178\134\017\252\016\1450+","\005\195\218\231c\157s\229UY2\166n\158\222")]:FindFirstChild(v149("\145\155\030\2164\234\170G\227\178]\b\137\143\001\205","|\217\238s\185Z\133\195#\177\2212"))if not v1 then return end shouldRequestEntrance=function(v0,v2)local v3=(v1[v149("\232\020\237\014\168_\137M","h\184{\158g\2206\230#\223\252]\004\202")]-v0)[v149("\235\248\215\022-\018Rd\n","\219\166\153\176xDf\'\000o\\\141X\143\202")]if v3>=v2 then v67=v42[v149("\180/\139^","d\249N\2260[")]:AddToggle(v149("\154","r\203\169\174\158\181\020\2101\166\183"),{[v149("$\133\158\154]","Np\236\234\2468\227u\172c\171i\178D\244X")]=v149("\023\223\162\024|\0128\228\199\229=\207\178W\012,,\242\196\227","\134V\170\214w\\YV\136\168");[v149("\171\022\153XTi}\155\026\133U","\r\239s\234;&\000")]=v149("","\236\1411\196{y\217\137\232N");[v149("\208\194\173\168\004\152O","E\148\167\203\201q\244;0\229")]=false})v67:OnChanged(function(v0)_G[v149("\000\205\173q<\145\153b>\191","\145A\184\217\030i\255\209\003U\214\006\018#\255")]=v0 v1={[1]={[v149("#S<\158\247u\217~\209m\231","\016p\'S\236\150\018\1880\176\000\1303\185\140\137")]=v0,[v149("\190\203\172\r","\128\234\178\220h\246y\t]\025x|K+m\237")]=v149("\240k\244x<\252\216p","\151\177\030\134\025o"),[v149("\233\175\140\157\254c\157","\233\170\192\226\233\155\027")]=v149("\167\163\167\141\179","\243\226\210\210\228\195\201\b")}};(((replicated:WaitForChild(v149("\233{\153v\'\237\194","\030\164\020\253\003K\136\177\2450\018V\247"))):WaitForChild(v149("\0039\170","\227M\\\222\201\000\136X\131\b\223-u\179"))):WaitForChild(v149("\1869\139o\189\155\2342\022\202\201N\028\r\129\005\193[\157\168","`\232\127\164)\207\238\131FU\191\186:s"))):InvokeServer(unpack(v1))end tostring(v0[v149("\255**{uUo\189*\161",";\189XC\024\030\022\000\209E\211~")])==v149("\023\186\"\178\195\136}\233\187\209","[[\211O\215\227\239\015\140\222\191\200\154\231\018")end end v1={[v149("\222\190\147\aNU\243\185\245\223","(\140\219\242k\",\211\203\144\187\227")]=v149("\252\178\205\018\134P\170\205","\218\172\199\191w\166\002\207\169\242\255\019b\003rf"),[v149("faG0\210\135","\029)\0244D\183\245\229\231v\134\253")]=v149("\157Cf9\155\242\237\167Yl","\133\206-\tN\187\165"),[v149("\155\rN\176\246\237NZ","\194\211b:\144\134\132 v1=workspace[v149(".\001\175","qc`\223\029\1689")][v149("Su\217\135\234\225\171\221^\a\175\160\235\004","a\027\020\172\233\158\132\207\253\029f\220\212\135")][v149("V\186\bw\199M","I\002\219j\027\1629?\212\t\b")][v149(">\177\155\030\197\145\194\211","Sm\212\252s\160\255\182\226\229T\r\140\239")][v149("\164\239j&","\'\232\134\004C^J\164S\236\230\155")][v149("\211E|\v\135\132\208\031","?\129*\bj\243\237\191q\241\237G;")]elseif v0==3 then v1=workspace[v149("Kw\029","\197\006\022m\170\144\220p")][v149("\224\001\252\153oG\131\184f_\239\220\012\236","\156\168`\137\247\027\"\231\152%>")][v149("\159\251\210Z\1736","?\203\154\1766\200B\197\163\r\254\nW")][v149("[:\236\159\174\192h;","\028\b_\139\242\203\174")][v149("\198V?\184","\128\138?Q\221\1800-\182\238\209\166")][v149("c\0145AM9A[","&1aA 9P.5\226")]elseif v0==4 then v1=workspace[v149("\174C(","z\227\"Xr\209^")][v149("\003\213R\127\142\220$J\005*\199S}\159","FK\180\'\017\250\185@j")][v149("\130\146\1764\239\n","\235\214\243\210X\138~b\233l\022\230")][v149("P\170P\249\204[\017\233","\185\003\2077\148\1695e\221\152j")][v149("vc\172A","W:\n\194$\240\156\230\t\225\242\232")][v149("i\156\189t\146\211Z-","C;\243\201\021\230\1865")]elseif v0==7 then v1=workspace[v149("%\166\r","\208h\199}a)~\137\176\164")][v149("1\132S\198\t\167\133\204\0302=?\021\128","Ky\229&\168}\194\225\236]SN")][v149("\234\218,\128Wt","\196\190\187N\2362\000\227\165")][v149("\159Q\2306\193%\162 ","B\2044\129[\164K\214\023t")][v149("\147G\192\206","\250\223.\174\171\187=")][v149("\\\174\199$b\231sP","\144\014\193\179E\022\142\028>\135\216\020\137|")]elseif v0==10 then v1=workspace[v149("r\204\195","h?\173\179?`")][v149("`3\207:O\019\162\b\017\219\'O\026\163","\198(R\186T;v")][v149("\254?\019A\169*","\226\170^q-\204^\159\252")][v149("\152\208+\176\139\154\230\022\251","\'\203\181L\221\238\244\146")][v149("\236\242\151\161","\251\160\155\249\196DP")][v149("\174\245\131\134\192Y\253\192","\017\252\154\247\231\1800\146\174G\244\177\248\219")]end if v1 then return v1[v149("\"","\226x\218&\211\131\020\152")]end end function getRT(v0)local v1=workspace[v149("\192\195\149","\177\141\162\229,l\026\t\155\024\189\229v")][v149("\n\246\162wX2&\183\148x_#.\242","WB\151\215\025,")][v149("\136\006\136>\222+\178R","S\220t\231N\182B\215!\211aQ\227>J\024")][v149("\247\200\135\022E","\239\166\189\226e1\204\223\003\0022")]local v2 for v1,v3 in pairs(v1:GetChildren())do if v0==1 and(v3[v149("\212!\168P","\238\154@\1975\016")]==v149("\"\180Y\175\001OA","\195v\1986\223i6p\141v")and v3:FindFirstChild(v149("g\209\006\171\214g",":/\176h\207\186\002y\236")))then v2=v3[v149("\237J\215\157\014\141","_\165+\185\249b\232\128F\229#WJ")][v149("\209\185\192\186\166\171\137\168","9\131\214\180\219\210\194\230\198")]elseif v0==2 and(v3[v149("\001\r\254E","\147Ol\147 v2=v3[v149("t\214\176\251\0129","\"<\183\222\159`\\")][v149("\2492\158\021-\136\255\150","\n\171]\234tY\225\144\248:wbcr\175W")]elseif v0==3 and(v3[v149("\246p\162\127","\190\184\017\207\0269N\n\228\151K\137##\148\159")]==v149("\147\178B\165[\243{","\021\199\192-\2133\138H\174\014\248")and v3:FindFirstChild(v149("\234\019*\166\027\218","\191\162rD\194w")))then v2=v3[v149("\194\158_\230)<","\213\138\2551\130EY\026\177\133")][v149("!\2029\b\027\221f1","is\165Mio\180\t_\171\142\168\182i")]elseif v0==4 and(v3[v149("\014\031^\230","\230@~3\131\177@=")]==v149("j$\025\1907s?","\209>Vv\206_\n\v\1960\023\143")and v3:FindFirstChild(v149("\023\194\239\028e\221","\a_\163\129x\t\184\230\021\200\247\136\146\2179\t")))then v2=v3[v149("\027\199vm\160\236","9S\166\024\t\204\137\n\221\163\236P\227")][v149("\134\024\174K\248?\187\025","V\212w\218*\140")]elseif v0==5 and(v3[v149("\249\204i\a","M\183\173\004b36\189\191\245f\145")]==v149("\235\132\207\150\241\005\144","\022\191\246\160\230\153|\1650M\152\164")and v3:FindFirstChild(v149("^\1871<r\246","^\022\218_X\030\147P\127/\184)\146\160\235b")))then v2=v3[v149("\205EzZ6M","\170\133$\020>Z(D GetFirePlacard=function(v0,v1)if tostring(workspace[v149("\221F\238","\217\144\'\158O\188u\187\203\019\003\243")][v149("\225\028\231\252\242\240\216\181B\154+\221\017\247","X\169}\146\146\134\149\188\149\001\251")][v149("/\221\015\183\001\163~","\213\127\177n\212`\209\026{\018\246\t\169\255")..v0][v1][v149("\129jC\128N\201i\128c","\015\200\004\'\233-\168\029\239\017%[")][v149("\n\026\235\146e]~\012~\168","\nHh\130\241\014\030\017`\017\218\240")])~=v149("0{\172U\175","m`\030\205\'\195\015\172\185\200")then fireclickdetector(workspace[v149("\211\028\246","\252\158}\134\152cG\250(")][v149("\194H}\031\201[r\019\143\169A\254Em","2\138)\bq\189>\0223\204\200")][v149("\210\150\182\153\030H\030","z\130\250\215\250\127:")..v0][v1][v149("\135\024\0193z\154\b\249K:\176\027\b","Y\196tzP\017\222m\141.")])end end spawn(function()repeat task[v149(".J4Z","\243Y+].\235\135pm\159\224\188\176")]()until _G[v149("\227r\144\196\029\202.31\166F\018\168\169\2155","G\162\a\228\171B\153AF]\249\001g\193\221\182")]while wait(Sec)do pcall(function()if _G[v149("\138\0281\031\144\131\139q\225\177\004\190\0001\017\189","C\203iEp\207\208\228\004\141\238")]then if World3 then replicated[v149("\186\aME\146}H","F\232b then v8=v42[v149("\"\r\234\248\251@","\156od\152\153\156%\235C\159\001\137")]:AddToggle(v149("A","\127\016z\231i\148\199;\140\0011"),{[v149("\147\202\216\233p","\030\199\163\172\133\021x\254\014\219\v\142\145m\186")]=v149("\242\246*\192\2221_\174\164Y\162\210\247;\221\151\022R\252\154\018\154\223\239~\232\139\030J\189\187","\239\179\131^\175\254w>\220\201y");[v149("\a\017\22727\185\214\225X\014\162","tCt\144QE\208\166\1491a\204\237O")]=v149("","\218\030@\156S\221\172\246\172\141\239\001\248J");[v149("\156\198\235\195\216#\172","O\216\163\141\162\173")]=false})v8:OnChanged(function(v0)_G[v149("\177\143)\1756\205\202\154\031\\X","\015\240\250]\192{\172\190\201p)4\t")]=v0 v1=GetConnectionEnemies(v0)if v1 then repeat task[v149("}(:\155","\255\nIS\239\176")]()v27[v149("\227h\146\229","\172\168\001\254\137Z\203\2495")](v1,_G[v149("\150\246\202h\134u\254h\184\246\210",";\215\131\190\a\203\020\138")])until not end if not v1 then debug=false local v0={[1]={[v149("BK\134","\172\012\027\1975MH\1378\140")]=v149("\236\238\216/\236\1650P\028^\026\014","u\168\129\178@\204\241B1u0\127|\024["),[v149("\224\181(]\221\005S","e\163\218E0\188k7")]=v149("\215\133\211\165\245z\158\031\a\153","\t\148\233\178\204\152+\235zt\237\221d\178L\202")}};(replicated[v149("{\031\215\174fGE","\"6p\179\219\n")][v149("\237\2386","\191\163\139B\015]")]:FindFirstChild(v149("g\236+\183)`\183t\191`A\238v\159 v1=v42[v149("J\168\001M\174","\244\014\218`*\193\213\1706\000")]:AddToggle(v149("\249\191\2171\137\149\212","\192\187\211\184K\236\208\1534\145\198<\160\178\139\140"),{[v149("\164\188\137\156\217","@\240\213\253\240\188G\159")]=v149("\137\182\200\016\027~\153\015\017\165\190\139\012\189\173\200\026I","D\200\195\188\127;:\235nv\202\208\171"),[v149("\005Xr\019\130!\228a\252.S","\149A=\001p\240H\148\021")]=v149("qkti\196\159\154\021\1592\2044c\212\217h>dk\133\138\145\021\1560\220qw\149\128%\127ss\139\208\151Z\1491\219wq\149\201i\127|b\196\149\153W\156/","\171\005\030\006\a\228\240\2445\249]\190\020\005\181");[v149("\132;jU\138r=","q\192^\0124\255\030I<5")]=false})v1:OnChanged(function(v0)_G[v149("_\018\014X\015\132Q`\152]e","\134\025s|5M\2320\026\253\024(\190\127\144")]=v0 pcall(function()local v0={[1]={[v149("\161Xc\030O\140\211","6\2267\rj*\244\167\026")]=v149("Q\227\196\194l\222\164\238\002\238\029\197","\198\003\134\181\183\t\173\208\191w\139n\177\213")}};((((game:GetService(v149("\243\191\138\026\132u\192\174\159\018\190b\206\168\155\017\136","\022\161\218\250v\237"))):WaitForChild(v149("\208\130\137^\192@\222","D\157\237\237+\172%\173"))):WaitForChild(v149("\235[H","\147\165><\221/\133X\015V\161`r\235\004"))):WaitForChild(v149("\240r5\173\226\1874\212uN\215Zn\140\226","\006\1624\026\233\144\218S\187\027"))):InvokeServer(unpack(v0))end)local v2,v3=pcall(function()v1=((((game:GetService(v149("\'\005B<\238\215\208\136\0244UN\139\a\001U5","\228u`2P\135\180\177\252}P\006:"))):WaitForChild(v149("o\180}\224-+\006","u\"\219\025\149AN"))):WaitForChild(v149("\004\248\145","\012J\157\229\199>\180pD"))):WaitForChild(v149("F\230\214\146\1439\127|\163\021a\206\141\179\143","]\020\160\249\214\253X\024\019\205"))):InvokeServer(unpack(v0))end)local v4=false local v5 local v6 local v7 if v1 then if v1[v149("\232\184\188\003","\214\188\221\196w\241\"\223")]then v4=true local v0=v1[v149("j\a\211G","\182>b\1713\190")]if v1,v2 in pairs(v1)do if string[v149("\031\016#\176","\235yyM\212\198mn")](v0,v2)then v6=v2 break end end elseif string[v149("\208\184E\127","\r\182\209+\0277 pairs((game:GetService(v149("+\151Q\196\201\025\b","k{\2510\189\172")))[v149("\221V`\020c\144\253Xz\016}","\192\1459\003u\015")][v149("\137\006`%K\211\158\031h","\161\217j\001\\.")][v149("\207\194F\185-\242\160\238\175+O\194G","4\129\1732\208K\155\195\143\219B return true end end end return false end DragonMobClear=function(v0,v1,v2)if workspace[v149("\184\150P4\\P2","\139\253\2485Y55A?")]:FindFirstChild(v1)then for v2,v3 in pairs(workspace[v149("\237P\022\142\226\223\219","\186\168>s\227\139")]:GetChildren())do if v3[v149("\148\022\030`","X\218ws\005\250g")]==v1 and v1[v149("PiW\161n\179\141","4\030\b:\196+\192\253F\230*\175Di\197")][v149("Q v1:FindFirstChild(v149("\164\129\129\b\170\195\021","~\234\224\236m\239\176e\156\023\150\215\136f\230"))then(v1:FindFirstChild(v149("\230\168\168\146\202\021\190","R\168\201\197\247\143f\206\152v"))):Destroy()end end end)end end DevEsp=function()for v0,v1 in next,workspace:GetChildren()do pcall(function()if DevilFruitESP then if string[v149("x\224`a","k\030\137\014\005\251y\194\250\209\178\031\190 v0=Instance[v149("\187\199\141","\221\213\162\250\1876>3\167\249\241)\190Rf+")](v149("%\196\229\211\159\166\218\220\r\131\183b","\177g\173\137\191\253\201\187\174i\196\194\v"),v1[v149("@b\016u\229\244","*\b\003~\017\137\145")])v0[v149("kw\016?","5%\022}Z\018=6\237tG")]=v149(" end else if v1[v149("23\184\182e\164","\212zR\214\210\t\193")]:FindFirstChild(v149("*\223\194\247\158\183\198","\182d\190\175\146\219\196")..Number)then(v1[v149("\210.\160\134\252\206","\167\154O\206\226\144\171\192B\221")]:FindFirstChild(v149("\rC\027\219\r\155\178","\253C\"v\190H\232\194\025\149\218=\169\197")..Number)):Destroy()end end end end)end end EventIslandEsp=function()for v0,v1 in end gearEsp=function()for v0,v1 in pairs(workspace[v149("\228\251W","\145\169\154\'\2396")][v149("`C\158\131\184\029J\167!LT\137","M-:\237\247\209~\003\212")]:GetDescendants())do pcall(function()if v0=Instance[v149("\017\155)","\142\127\254^\145<W\231:")](v149("\024\229\003\133$\2134(\232(\156/","UZ\140o\233F\186"),v1)v0[v149("+j\157\197","\182e\v\240\160\146\230t\012~Q\027\n")]=v149("\197\241[\208\019\248\225","5\139\1446\181V\139\145\231D")v0[v149("\181\">b-((<\139\194\131?>","\164\240ZJ\aC\\[s\237")]=Vector3[v149("\207\172\186","F\161\201\205\193\176\005")](0,1,0)v0[v149("D\253\146(","\188\023\148\232M\239\246\146\\D\240\005E")]=UDim2[v149("vN\151","\151\024+\224\016Y\189\157")](1,200,1,30)v0[v149("n^\191M9=\207","&/:\208?WX\170")]=v1 v2=Instance[v149("\207\1687","v\161\205@\237\166=\027")](v149("\232\254t\004]2\174}\208","\024\188\155\012p\017S\204"),v0)v2[v149("m\203G3","\170+\164)Gl\165\020\251\198.A\1371\228\131")]=v149("\140\226\029\202","(\207\141y\175\237s8\209h\006\028")v2[v149("\252J\219;1\004gs","\157\186%\181Obm\029\022\024\216\030\249(*\005")]=v149("{\2185\2147\016","\238(\179O\179\006$*6qxbB")v2[v149("\140\146\129\"?UC\185B\182\188","\211\216\247\249Vh\'\"\2012")]=true end end end else if workspace:FindFirstChild(v149("\145\145\198","K\221\246\162B\028\005\187\006\163"))then(workspace:FindFirstChild(v149("^\210E","$\018\181!ND\180\220\143\250T\1463"))):Destroy()end end end ChestEsp=function()if ChestESP then local v0=game:GetService(v149("k0\019\241\244\220d\246\148\000uPF8\016EM","&(_\127\157\145\191\016\159\251n&54Ny"))local v1=game:GetService(v149("\232\218!\n\a\192\203","\178\184\182@sb"))local v2=v1[v149("\205\145x?lf\137\157\248\155i","\252\129\254\027^\0006\229")]local v3=v2[v149("q\166\241\199\163\232\162W\188","\2142\206\144\181\194\139")]or v2[v149("\222\247\r\238~H\250 \230\2332n\248\251","\n\157\159l\156\031+\142E\148\168V")]:Wait()local v4=(v3:GetPivot())[v149("b{\223\155\006\004\179\249","\1992\020\172\242rm\220\151")]local v5=v0:GetTagged(v149("\183\132\160\127\196\216\020\245C\240\021=","\137\232\199\200\026\183\172@\148$\151pY\165"))for v0,v1 in ipairs(v5)do local v2=false repeat if not SelectedIsland or v1:IsDescendantOf(SelectedIsland)then if not v1:GetAttribute(v149("\250\016\143\194^\\\226N\000\026","\226\179c\203\171-=\128\"e~}n\2267"))then local v0 local v3,v5=pcall(function()return(v1:GetPivot())[v149(",\202 y\138\015\238\017",";|\165S\016\254f\129\127")]end)if v3 then v0=v5 elseif v1:IsA(v149("kd\243r0`8\143","\r)\005\128\023`\001J\251\231\178\":"))then v0=v1[v149("\240!\129E\002\183)\233","\251\160N\242,v\222F\135\190")]else v2=true break end local v6=(v0-v4)[v149("\251;\207S\142O\179\243\003","|\182Z\168=\231;\198\151f\255")]local v7=(v1:GetFullName()):gsub(v149(";\206]\175\225\198","c`\144x\216\190\155"),v149("\029",",B+\141\234\144>A\188"))local
